name: seance
description: Summon a fresh Claude chat that channels the context of your current session.

nudge.title: Séance nudge threshold
nudge.description: How long to let a session grow before reminding you to run /seance: light (~150 KB, nudges early), medium (~350 KB), long (~700 KB, nudges late), or off. You can also enter a raw KB number.

summarizer.title: Séance summarizer model
summarizer.description: Which model writes the note from the trimmed transcript: sonnet (default, spares your Opus budget), haiku (cheapest), opus (best note but costs more than in-session), or self (compose in the current session, no separate call).
